@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+"""Quality gate runner for tenzir-changelog."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import shlex
+import subprocess
+from typing import Sequence
+
+_COMMANDS: Sequence[Sequence[str]] = (
+    ("ruff", "format", "--check"),
+    ("ruff", "check"),
+    ("mypy",),
+    ("pytest",),
+    ("uv", "build"),
+)
+
+
+def _run(command: Sequence[str]) -> None:
+    printable = " ".join(shlex.quote(part) for part in command)
+    print(f"> {printable}")
+    result = subprocess.run(command, check=False)
+    if result.returncode != 0:
+        raise SystemExit(result.returncode)
+
+
+def main() -> int:
+    for command in _COMMANDS:
+        _run(command)
+    return 0
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    raise SystemExit(main())

+def _parse_created_date(raw_value: object | None) -> date:
+    if raw_value is None:
+        return date.today()
+    return date.fromisoformat(str(raw_value))
+
+
+def _normalize_entries_field(raw_value: object | None) -> list[str]:
+    if raw_value is None:
+        return []
+    if isinstance(raw_value, str):
+        return [raw_value]
+    if isinstance(raw_value, IterableCollection):
+        return [str(item) for item in raw_value]
+    return [str(raw_value)]
+
+
